name: KB Content Issue
about: Report incorrect, missing, or unsafe knowledge base content
title: ''
labels: kb-content

---

## Article ID

If applicable, the KB article ID (e.g., `billing-line-items-cn`).

## Issue Type

- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Missing content
- [ ] Unsafe/boundary violation
- [ ] Outdated source
- [ ] Missing regional coverage

## Description

Describe the issue and what should be changed.

## Region

Which region(s) does this affect? (US / CN / HK / SG / JP / global)
